title: By His Stripes we are Healed
summary: “But he was wounded for our transgressions, he was bruised for our iniquities: the chastisement of our peace was upon him; and with his stripes we are healed.”Isaiah 53:5  “Who his own self bare our sins in his own body on the tree, that we, being dead to sins, should live unto righteousness: by whose stripes ye were healed.“ 1Peter 2:24  Healing of the physical body in Jesus’ name is a very important teaching in the scriptures. The human body has never been healthier and more robust than at the moment God breathed life unto Adam, looked at him and declared that it was very good. This was a body designed to live forever on earth. Just consider the earth from which our bodies have been made. The Spirit of God replenishes the earth so that it produces food in abundance. God heals nature every day; we can witness the principles of healing and reparation in nature. The God who heals and restores the soil of the earth is able to heal and restore our natural bodies which were created from the earth. When one looks at seeds of different kinds, it is not apparent what kind of plant, bush or tree it will turn out to be – God determines the physical proportions.
